chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1237 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.3100/2026 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.3101/2026 (Return of surety) 20.04.2026 Mr.Shahid Mirbahar, Advocate for the applicant Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant/surety states that vide Order dated 13.11.2024, the applicant/accused Gotam Parkash was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further stated that vide Order dated 25.11.2024, the bail was dismissed and interim bail earlier granted to the applicant/accused was recalled, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
